title: Clockwork Islands
description:
kitchen sink mod pack/500+mods magic./create steampunk.
I always liked skyblock packs but I wanted something different with more to do and explore so this is skylands.
body:
in this pack you start on a small island in the distence other islands floating in the sky. explore dungons fight bosses or just surive on your starter island.
this is a kichensink pack.

this modpack offers:
- novel world gen in the form of floating island and seas.
- multiplayer voice chat.
- steampunk create powered airships with Eureka Valkyrien Skies clockwork you can make your house fly.
- magic from botania, Ars Nouveau, blood magic, and many more.
- [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) and [Mythic Mounts](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-mounts) to help expore.
- gliders grapling hooks and more.
- forgiveing void for when you fall off.
- diffcult bosses form [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves), and [L_enders Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm).
this is a end remasted pack so the normal end portal dose not spawn you will need to ether find the modded eyes in dungon loot or make your own portal to get there. the ender dragon fight has ben modded as well so good luck.

so if you want to try something new download clockwork islands today.

final notes:
some of the 500+ mods in this pack are still in bata and could be unstable I do not make mods and will not be trying to pach edit or reblaence anything I put this modpack together by myself to have eveything I wanted in one place.

needs 4-6gb of ram to run I sugest 8 your mileage may vary with shaders.
